title: Distributed Task Queue System
description: Designed and implemented a custom task queue capable of handling 10k+ concurrent jobs with retries, dead-letter queues, and rate limiting. Replaced a legacy Celery implementation, reducing infrastructure costs by 40% and latency by 60%.

title: Real-time Analytics Pipeline
description: Architected a data pipeline to ingest and visualize user activity logs in real-time. Leveraged Kafka for event streaming and ClickHouse for sub-second analytical queries on millions of rows. Built a FastAPI wrapper to serve aggregated metrics to the frontend.

title: AI-Powered Code Review Agent
description: Developed a GitHub bot that automatically reviews PRs, identifies security vulnerabilities, and suggests performance improvements. Uses RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) with a vector database of internal best practices documentation to provide context-aware feedback.
